description: Hunter negotiates with Kebo, a Hydra operative, after proving himself in the underground fight. Kebo assures Hunter he will soon meet his boss, moving the Hydra infiltration storyline forward.

transcript.line: You certainly don't make it easy to get a meeting.
The boss doesn't want it to be easy. But he's always interested in meeting people who can prove themselves.
Sounds like an interesting bloke. I look forward to meeting him someday.
